---
title: "Bisamdetektion"
# output: html_document
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    theme:
      # united
      # simplex
      # yeti
      # readable:
        primary:
          "#144836"
    logo:
      # naturhistoriska-riksmuseet2.png
      # nrm-logo-liggande-svensk-negativ.png
      nrm-logo.svg
      
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(leaflet)

# bisamData <- data.frame(Sample = paste0(LETTERS[1:4], 1:4), Lattitude = c(59.38922707244422, 59.40670467084389, 59.4231253955455, 59.28750377236695), Longitude = c(17.9626577586649, 18.20916347794304, 17.80335601250187, 18.166248136843084), Result = c("positiv", "negativ", "positiv", "negativ"))
bisamData <- readxl::read_xlsx("map_data.xlsx")
bisamData$Latitude <- as.numeric(bisamData$Latitude)
bisamData$Longitude <- as.numeric(bisamData$Longitude)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
colorByResult <- colorFactor(palette = c("darkgreen", "red", "orange"), domain = c("positiv", "negativ", "okĂ¤nd"), ordered = TRUE)

counts_html <- paste0(
  '<div style="background:white; padding:10px;">',
  'Antal positiva prover: <span style="float:right; font-weight:bold"> ', sum(bisamData$Result == "positiv", na.rm = TRUE), "</span><br>",
  'Antal negativa prover: <span style="float:right; font-weight:bold"> ', sum(bisamData$Result == "negativ", na.rm = TRUE), "</span>"
)

leaflet::leaflet(bisamData) %>%
  leaflet::addTiles() %>%
  # leaflet::addMarkers(lng = ~ Longitude, lat = ~ Lattitude, label = ~ Sample) %>%
  leaflet::addCircleMarkers(lng = ~ Longitude, lat = ~ Latitude, label = ~ Sample, popup = ~ paste0("<b>", Sample, "</b>: ", Result), color = ~ colorByResult(Result)) %>%
  leaflet::addLegend(values = ~ Result, pal = colorByResult, title = "Resultat") %>%
  leaflet::addControl(html = counts_html, position = "bottomright")
```
